title: Robust APIs and fast Snowflake integration
pros: Kafka ingestion to golden records consistently under 2 minutes p95; API docs are excellent; dedup accuracy improved our match rate by ~85%.
cons: Pricing is premium vs peers; initial VPC trial took longer than expected.

title: Strong security posture and auditability
pros: SOC 2 Type II and ISO gave our security team confidence; field-level audit exports simplified our reviews.
cons: UI for rule editing feels dated (they said a refresh is coming).

title: Migration support was excellent
pros: Their team helped us migrate from a homegrown MDM in ~12 weeks; survivorship rules in YAML are portable.
cons: Azure private preview connectors were a bit buggy but support acknowledged and patched within a sprint.

title: Per-record pricing can add up
pros: Real-time mastering and lineage views are solid.
cons: We underestimated record growth and hit overages; advice is to model volume carefully.

title: Easy setup and clean UI
pros: Onboarding was fast; UI for basic rules is intuitive; Snowflake connector worked out-of-the-box.
cons: Exports incur per-row fees and rate limits; not ideal for large batch exports.

title: Near real-time, but not truly streaming
pros: CDC pipelines updated records roughly every 10 minutes, which was acceptable for us.
cons: Kafka remains in beta and we had durability issues in tests.

title: Security lagging for enterprise needs
pros: SAML SSO worked with Okta; basic RBAC is fine for small teams.
cons: SOC 2 Type II not available; backups outside EU by default triggered lengthy legal review.

title: Value pricing, good for SMB
pros: Base pricing is attractive; Postgres connector is stable.
cons: Support response times slipped to 6–8 hours for P1 twice; export fees were a surprise post-implementation.
